structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-20 Relaunch of TDHCA DPA for Texas Homebuyers
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-20 08:51:55-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The Texas Department of Housing and Community Affairs (TDHCA) offers down payment assistance programs to homebuyers across the state of Texas. Capital Markets is pleased to relaunch TDHCA, offering borrowers in Texas even more options to achieve their dream of home ownership. Please read below for details. 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Down Payment Assistance

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EixHtYwDu61GgQ7jzGi2N34B9QsRzWB_mwsMBSSX-Bzt7g?e=wTiHh2> 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EgA4JBqGohZMi2wG9qeFwmUB5eQ1kEYXvPP7FgZ5g01KOg?e=9utTkW> 

Rates <chrome-extension://efaidnbmnnnibpcajpcglclefindmkaj/https:/thetexashomebuyerprogram.com/uploads/Rate-Notice.pdf> 

 Training Module Information <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:b:/s/Home/EVkk3MsRHWhJoXIfOFdiS7EBdb5r_nf2mxoJpw8o7lN1Aw?e=DI7Ykn> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	620+ FICO, Manufactured homes permitted
*	Income and purchase price limits apply <https://thetexashomebuyerprogram.com/uploads/Limits.pdf> 
*	Homebuyer Education required

My Choice Texas

*	Available to repeat buyers
*	Up to 5% assistance
*	DPA options include: 30 year deferred repayable and 3-year deferred forgivable 

My First Texas 

*	FTHB only
*	Up to 5% assistance
*	May be combined with MCC option
*	DPA options include: 30-year deferred repayable, 3-year deferred forgivable, or no DPA

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Loan Officers must complete a training module to utilize TDHCA loan products. Please see the attached information for more detail. 

ATTACHMENTS

*	Marketing
*	Training Module Information

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us: 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
